issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1382: remaining Python asset sweep 2/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1382 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `c5450aef`.
The first push was rejected after `origin/main` advanced to `2b00b910`; the lane was then rebased and revalidated at `cb64af0f`.
A second remote advance to `ea03f42d` required replaying the lane commits again; the next rebased tip before push was `e2099121`.
A continuation rebase onto `6fc610a2` produced local tip `e8117e01`, which passed the targeted regression guard in `0.188s`.
Direct pushes to `origin/main` remain blocked by repeated non-fast-forward races, so the validated lane is being maintained on `origin/big-go-1382`.
